import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(data, column="c"):
    # Remove the specified column from the DataFrame
    modified_df = data.drop(columns=[column])

    # Check if the remaining DataFrame has any numeric columns
    numeric_cols = modified_df.select_dtypes(include=['int64', 'float64']).columns.tolist()

    if len(numeric_cols) > 0:
        # Plot the numeric data, assuming the first numeric column to plot
        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
        modified_df[numeric_cols[0]].plot(ax=ax)
        ax.set_title("Remaining Numeric Data")
        ax.set_xlabel("Index")
        ax.set_ylabel(numeric_cols[0])
        plot_ax = ax
    else:
        # No numeric data to plot, return None for the plot_ax
        plot_ax = None

    return modified_df, plot_ax
